Analysis: The val_loss improved from 0.0208 to 0.0204 with the larger model. This should translate to better RMSE. The TTA (8 longitude shifts) is already in predict.py. Let me submit the current best.pt checkpoint.

Decision: Submit current best.pt for evaluation. The checkpoint should have val_loss=0.020442 which is the best so far.
